psalm-97-1.verse:
The Lord reigns, let the earth rejoice;
  Let the many islands be glad.
psalm-97-1.prayer: Lord, You reign over all the earth. Help my heart rejoice in Your sovereignty, goodness, and power.

psalm-97-2.verse:
Clouds and thick darkness surround Him;
  Righteousness and justice are the foundation of His throne.
psalm-97-2.prayer: Father, righteousness and justice are the foundation of Your throne. Teach me to trust Your rule and walk in Your truth.

psalm-97-3.verse:
Fire goes before Him
  And burns up His adversaries round about.
psalm-97-3.prayer: Lord, let everything that opposes Your holiness be consumed by Your presence. Purify my heart and lead me in righteousness.

psalm-97-4.verse:
His lightnings lit up the world;
  The earth saw and trembled.
psalm-97-4.prayer: Father, Your glory lights up the world. Open my eyes to see Your majesty and stand in awe of Your power.

psalm-97-5.verse:
The mountains melted like wax at the presence of the Lord,
  At the presence of the Lord of the whole earth.
psalm-97-5.prayer: Lord, every mountain melts before You. Help me remember that no obstacle is greater than Your authority.

psalm-97-6.verse:
The heavens declare His righteousness,
  And all the peoples have seen His glory.
psalm-97-6.prayer: Father, let my life declare Your righteousness and reflect Your glory to those around me.

psalm-97-7.prayer: Lord, keep me from idols and anything false that competes with worship of You. Help me honor You alone.

psalm-97-8.verse:
Zion heard this and was glad,
  And the daughters of Judah have rejoiced
  Because of Your judgments, O Lord.
psalm-97-8.prayer: Father, let my heart rejoice in Your judgments because Your ways are righteous, true, and good.

psalm-97-9.verse:
For You are the Lord Most High over all the earth;
  You are exalted far above all gods.
psalm-97-9.prayer: Lord, You are exalted above all. Help me place You first in my thoughts, desires, and decisions.

psalm-97-10.prayer: Father, teach me to love what You love and hate what is evil. Preserve my soul and deliver me from darkness.

psalm-97-11.verse:
Light is sown like seed for the righteous
  And gladness for the upright in heart.
psalm-97-11.prayer: Lord, thank You for sowing light for the righteous and joy for those who are upright in heart.

psalm-97-12.verse:
Be glad in the Lord, you righteous ones,
  And give thanks to His holy name.
psalm-97-12.prayer: Father, help me rejoice in You and give thanks to Your holy name with a faithful and grateful heart.

psalm-97-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for reigning in righteousness, justice, holiness, and glory. Help me reject every idol, love what is good, and walk faithfully in Your truth. Let Your light and joy fill my heart, and may my life continually give thanks to Your holy name. Keep me close to You and let everything in me honor Your sovereign rule.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
